observations.note: Lean orchestration pattern excellently executed - command reduced from 576 to 400 lines (30.6%) by extracting error handling and YAML parsing to skill references
Separation of concerns: Command now pure orchestrator (Phase 0-3), error handling in references, YAML parsing in skill layer. Clear responsibility boundaries maintained.
Error categorization taxonomy comprehensive with 4 categories (Skill Loading, Invocation, Validation, User Exit) - pattern matching approach enables consistent recovery
Functional regression testing thorough: 24/24 structural tests pass covering all 3 modes (brainstorm/fresh/project) - no functionality lost in extraction

Progressive disclosure pattern well-applied: commands provide quick reference (19 lines error section), references provide deep knowledge (217 lines taxonomy). Aligns with architecture-constraints.md principle
Backward compatibility maintained: Command's external contract unchanged - users still provide business idea, brainstorms still detected, skill still invoked, errors still recovered
Reference pointer correctness verified: brainstorm-handoff-workflow.md explicit migration note (lines 100-102) clarifies responsibility shift from command to skill layer
Minor: Phase 0.2 comment could explicitly reference brainstorm-handoff-workflow.md file path for better developer experience during maintenance. Currently mentions 'Section 2' but not full path.
Documentation quality maintained: All 3 files follow YAML frontmatter conventions with version, status, creation date. Supports framework self-improvement tracking.

All AC criteria met: AC#1-6 verified complete. Error extraction done (AC#1), section reduced to 19 lines (AC#2), Phase 0 simplified (AC#3), YAML parsing moved (AC#4), line count under 400 (AC#5), no regression (AC#6)
